chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-665 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 08.12.2021 Mr. Muhammad Sachal R. Awan advocate for petitioner. Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari Assistant A.G. Agha Iftikhar H. Tareen advocate for respondent No.6. -.-.-. After hearing at some length, it has been informed that on the same cause of action, the petitioner filed a F.C. Suit No.246/2019 but plaint was rejected under order 7 Rule 11 CPC on the ground that it did not disclose a cause of action against which the appeal has been preferred before learned Additional District Judge Shahdadpur. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he intends to file a fresh suit on same cause of action after removing the lacunas / defects on the basis of which the plaint was rejected and he may be put on liberty to do the same. If the plaint is rejected, new suit / fresh suit is maintainable on the same cause of action in terms of Order 7 Rule 13 CPC. Therefore there is no need of permission by the court for that. With these observations, this petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
